title: Portable Jukebox
description: This Mod adds a Portable Jukebox with Bundle-Like mechanics that plays a random Disk that is in it for the holder.
body:
# Portable Jukeboxes

This Mod adds a Portable Jukebox that is crafted with four planks and one diamond. The Portable Jukebox acts simelar to a Bundle but only Music Discs can be placed in it.

# Crafting

![Crafting the Jukebox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a25014f373b76d8756d199707e0d979346832436.png)

# Usage

While in the inventory the jukebox will try to play a random music disk it holds.

The current disk can be skipped by right-clicking with the jukebox in the mainhand.

Shift-Right-Clicked causes the Jukebox to pause, indicated by the now reddish bar at the bottom. To continue playing just shift-right-click again.

The Sounds are played only to the holder of the box so that they do not intefere with each other.
